module_design.design_summary: Move _compress_line_nos from local definitions in main.py and ui/app.py into a new core/utils.py module. Both source files will import from core.utils.
module_design.interface_contract: Input: raw_nos: List[object] — line number values (str or numeric) Output: str — compressed range notation (e.g., "1~3,5~6") Contract: function signature identical to existing local definitions; no behavior change Import: from core.utils import _compress_line_nos in both main.py and ui/app.py
module_design.implementation_plan: 1. Create FEAT-20260426-332E/core/utils.py with _compress_line_nos function 2. Remove local _compress_line_nos from main.py (lines 34-63) 3. Add from core.utils import _compress_line_nos inside _cli_main imports block in main.py 4. Remove local _compress_line_nos from ui/app.py (lines 30-59) 5. Add from core.utils import _compress_line_nos at module level in ui/app.py
module_design.verification_plan: T5 test: python -c "from core.utils import _compress_line_nos; print(_compress_line_nos([1,2,3,5,6]))" Must return "1~3,5~6" (returncode=0, stdout contains "1") Additional: verify no local _compress_line_nos definition remains in main.py or ui/app.py
